content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.cosmos_media_generator
FILE: cosmos/core/cosmos_media_generator.py (563 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS Media Generator
======================
Generates video and images using Google Gemini APIs,
with prompts enriched by the Cosmos 54D Transformer and CST Physics.

Flow:
    User Prompt → Cosmos Transformer (54D CST enrichment) → Enhanced Prompt → Gemini → Media

Image Generation: Uses Gemini's

CLASSES:
- CosmosMediaGenerator: Generates media (video/image) powered by:
1. Cosmos 54D Transformer — enriches p
  Methods: def get_cst_context(self) -> dict
  Methods: async def enhance_prompt(self, raw_prompt: str, media_type: str='video') -> str
  Methods: async def generate_image(self, prompt: str, enhance: bool=True) -> dict
  Methods: async def generate_video(self, prompt: str, model: str='veo-2', enhance: bool=True, timeout: int=300
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_media_generator() -> CosmosMediaGenerator
